creator: zirias@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 169579
linuxdoc-tools-0.9.71.diff

New dependency for DOCS to dvipsk introduced, because the standard docs configure option builds a PDF using latex.

My build logs:
http://palmen-it.de/paste/fbsd-ports/linuxdoc-tools/20160422_0.9.71_9.3-RELEASE_amd64.log
http://palmen-it.de/paste/fbsd-ports/linuxdoc-tools/20160422_0.9.71_11.0-CURRENT_amd64.log
